title: Totem of undying cooldown
description: adds a 60 sec cd to the totem of undying
body:
Cooldown for Totem of Undying

The mod imposes a cooldown on the use of Totem of Undying. I think this mod will go to servers with a bias in PVP.
Note

    Cooldown works just like ender perl.
    Cooldown = 60 second.
    Supported versions minecraft: > 1.20.1/1.21.1

Dependencies

    Fabric API - Required - The Fabric API is used by this mod for networking and event handling reasons.



update from [https://modrinth.com/mod/cooldown-totem](https://modrinth.com/mod/cooldown-totem) under the MIT licence.
